title: SPCA seeks corporate partner
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA), a beacon of hope for countless animals in need, is in urgent need of a corporate partner who shares a passion for animal welfare and community impact.

By choosing the GRSPCA as your charity of the year, your company has the opportunity to not only meet its corporate social responsibility goals but also make a tangible, lasting difference in the lives of animals across the region.

The reason


> Supporting the GRSPCA is more than just philanthropy; it's an investment in compassion, community, and corporate integrity.


"By adopting us as your chosen charity, you align your brand with a cause that resonates deeply with many – the well-being of animals," says the SPCA's marketing and fundraising manager, Samantha Trietsch.

Partnering with a welfare organisation like the GRSPCA offers a unique way to inspire your team while addressing urgent animal welfare needs.

Inspire and unite your team

One of the ways to get involved is through the GRSPCA's corporate challenge events. "These events are designed to motivate and unite your team, giving them a sense of camaraderie while contributing to a worthy cause. Whether it's running, cycling, swimming, or even skydiving, there's an event for everyone. We can work together to create a bespoke challenge that resonates with your team's interests and strengths," says Trietsch.

Make your contribution count

Another way to make a meaningful impact is by sponsoring a specific expense.

"Whether it's veterinary care, food, or another core service, any sponsorship will be prominently highlighted where our supporters will see it – at our branch, on the road, and across our digital platforms," says Trietsch.


> They also provide tax certificates.


Make a difference

This is a rare opportunity to form a partnership that will leave a lasting legacy, both for your company and for the countless animals whose lives will be transformed.

nFor more information or to discuss how your company can get involved, please contact Sam Trietsch on 079 771 0996 or email [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
